brand_identity.name: IEMA.ai
brand_identity.vibe: Architectural Precision, Old Money Tech, Vercel/Cursor aesthetic
brand_identity.description: A premium, ultra-fast, minimal AI platform that feels like an elite developer tool.

layouts.sidebar: w-[260px] flex-shrink-0 border-r border-border bg-surface transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out
layouts.container: container mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

buttons.primary: rounded-md bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: rounded-md bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: rounded-md border border-border bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: rounded-md bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground px-4 py-2 transition-colors

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-border bg-surface p-6 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

chat.user_bubble: bg-surface_elevated text-text_primary rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 max-w-[80%]
chat.code_block: rounded-md bg-[#0D0D0F] border border-border p-4 font-mono text-sm overflow-x-auto my-4

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install Google fonts in index.css: Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them. Strip away generic looks. Use the provided color palette.
Implement a collapsible sidebar layout (260px to 64px) using responsive design. On mobile, it should be a drawer.
Dark theme is the default and should look phenomenal. True grey bases (#09090B), not pure black.
Chat interface: Render markdown and syntax-highlighted code blocks using react-markdown and rehype-highlight or similar.
Pricing page: Use a 3-tier structure with the middle 'Pro' tier highlighted.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or sticky headers. Always use solid or glassmorphism (backdrop-blur).
Avoid generic purple gradients. Stick to the monochromatic + electric blue accent scheme.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Create distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
Do NOT center align the app container. Align text to the left naturally.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use generous spacing. Cramped designs look cheap.
